experiment: Repeated equivalence evaluation across three wall-panel complexity levels under (1) framing order plus HLAFs plus human knowledge plus design information and (2) HLAFs plus design information plus a worked sample

1_Framing_Order_HLAFs_Human_Knowledge_De.label: Framing Order + HLAFs + Human Knowledge + Design Info
1_Framing_Order_HLAFs_Human_Knowledge_De.description: Target assembly/design information and finalized HLAF interfaces are supplemented with Ext-A human trade knowledge and explicit framing-order/action-sequence rules. No worked sample is supplied.

2_HLAFs_Design_Info_With_Sample.label: HLAFs + Design Info + Worked Sample
2_HLAFs_Design_Info_With_Sample.description: Target assembly/design information and finalized HLAF interfaces are supplemented with one worked assembly example. Human trade knowledge and framing-order rules are omitted.
